message:
fix(net,transport): defer registration drop in TCP split, add async unix connect, and use VecDeque in BufferedSink

tcp/split: Defer I/O registration drops until after releasing the mutex
guard in ensure_registration and update_after_io to prevent potential
deadlocks when drop handlers touch shared state while the lock is held.

unix/stream: Replace blocking UnixStream::connect with non-blocking
socket2 connect that integrates with the I/O driver. When connect()
returns EINPROGRESS/WouldBlock, a wait_for_connect future polls for
completion using the I/O driver registration. Includes a fallback poll
loop (1ms sleep + yield) when no I/O driver is available. Applied to both
connect() and connect_abstract().

transport/sink: Replace Vec<AuthenticatedSymbol> with VecDeque in
BufferedSink to make flush O(1) per symbol via pop_front() instead of
O(n) via remove(0) which shifts the entire buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
